get.summary:
ListProjectApiKeys returns all API keys for a project
Required Permissions:
- read:serverless_api_keys

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description:
Project the API keys belong to (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

delete.summary:
DeleteProjectApiKey removes an API key from a project
Required Permissions:
- delete:serverless_api_keys

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description:
Project the key belongs to (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: projectApiKeyId
parameters.description:
ID of the key to delete (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

post.summary:
CreateProjectApiKey creates a new API key for a project
Required Permissions:
- write:serverless_api_keys

parameters.name: projectApiKey.accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: projectApiKey.projectId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the project (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

id.description:
Unique identifier for the project api key (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a project api key is created.

createdAt.description:
Timestamp when the project api key was created.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a project api key is created.

name.description:
Name of the project api key.
This is a required field.
Name can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, underscores and dashes.

expiresAt.description:
The expiration time of the project api key. The key will be invalid after this time.
This field is optional, and if not provided, the key does not expire.

accessRules.description:
A list of rules to grant access to the Qdrant serverless project or to specific
collections in that project. If no access rules are provided, global access to the project
with manage permissions is assumed. The list can contain a maximum of 20
access rules.

createdByEmail.description:
The email of the user who created the project api key.
This is an optional read-only field and will be available after a project api key is created.
If the ProjectApiKey is created by an actual user the information will be filled-out, if it's created programmatically the field will be empty.

postfix.description:
Postfix for the project api key, this represents the last bytes of the key.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a project api key is created.

key.description:
The key for the project api key.
This is a read-only field and will be available only once in the response of CreateProjectApiKey.
You should securely store this key and it should be handled as a secret.

projectApiKey.description:
The API key to create.
This is a required field.

ProjectApiKeyServiceCreateProjectApiKeyB.title: CreateProjectApiKeyRequest defines parameters for creating a new project API key

globalAccess.description: A rule granting global access to the entire project.

collectionAccess.description: A rule granting access to a specific collection in the project.

v1AccessRule.description:
Represents an access rule. An access rule can either define global access to
the project or access to a specific collection.

collectionName.description:
The name of the collection.
This is a required field.

accessType.description:
The type of access granted for the collection.
This is a required field.

v1CollectionAccessRule.description: Represents an access rule for a specific collection in the project.

v1CollectionAccessRuleAccessType.description:
- COLLECTION_ACCESS_RULE_ACCESS_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified access type.
 - COLLECTION_ACCESS_RULE_ACCESS_TYPE_READ_ONLY: Grants access to perform collection-related actions that only read data (like `get collection info`).
 - COLLECTION_ACCESS_RULE_ACCESS_TYPE_READ_WRITE: Grants access to perform collection-related actions that read or write data (like `upsert points`).
v1CollectionAccessRuleAccessType.title:
CollectionAccessRuleAccessType defines the types of access allowed on a specific collection.
For a detailed list of actions allowed for each access type, see:
https://qdrant.tech/documentation/guides/security/#table-of-access

projectApiKey.title: The newly created API key value

v1CreateProjectApiKeyResponse.title: CreateProjectApiKeyResponse provides the API key after creation

v1DeleteProjectApiKeyResponse.title: DeleteProjectApiKeyResponse is an empty response for deletion confirmation

accessType.description:
The type of access granted at the global level.
This is a required field.

v1GlobalAccessRule.description: Represents a global access rule that grants access to the entire project.

v1GlobalAccessRuleAccessType.description:
- GLOBAL_ACCESS_RULE_ACCESS_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified access type.
 - GLOBAL_ACCESS_RULE_ACCESS_TYPE_READ_ONLY: Grants access to perform actions that only read data (e.g., list collections).
 - GLOBAL_ACCESS_RULE_ACCESS_TYPE_MANAGE: Grants access to perform all actions available in the project (e.g., update aliases).
v1GlobalAccessRuleAccessType.title:
GlobalAccessRuleAccessType defines the possible access levels for global access rules.
For a detailed list of actions allowed for each access type, see:
https://qdrant.tech/documentation/guides/security/#table-of-access

items.title: List of API keys for the project

v1ListProjectApiKeysResponse.title: Response containing all API keys associated with a project

id.description:
Unique identifier for the project api key (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a project api key is created.

accountId.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

createdAt.description:
Timestamp when the project api key was created.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a project api key is created.

projectId.description:
The identifier of the project (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

name.description:
Name of the project api key.
This is a required field.
Name can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, underscores and dashes.

expiresAt.description:
The expiration time of the project api key. The key will be invalid after this time.
This field is optional, and if not provided, the key does not expire.

accessRules.description:
A list of rules to grant access to the Qdrant serverless project or to specific
collections in that project. If no access rules are provided, global access to the project
with manage permissions is assumed. The list can contain a maximum of 20
access rules.

createdByEmail.description:
The email of the user who created the project api key.
This is an optional read-only field and will be available after a project api key is created.
If the ProjectApiKey is created by an actual user the information will be filled-out, if it's created programmatically the field will be empty.

This is a read-only field and will be available after a project api key is created.

This is a read-only field and will be available only once in the response of CreateProjectApiKey.

v1ProjectApiKey.description:
A ProjectApiKey represents one project api key of a Qdrant cloud account.
This project key can grant access to a Qdrant cloud serverless project.
